query:
SELECT id, name, created_at FROM commercial_assets WHERE name LIKE '%Sprint%' OR name LIKE '%sprint%' OR name LIKE '%Test%' OR name LIKE '%test%' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20;
SELECT id, name, created_at FROM deals WHERE name LIKE '%Sprint%' OR name LIKE '%sprint%' OR name LIKE '%Test%' OR name LIKE '%test%' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20;
